languages.text: {n}Себериан, совладав с потрясением, позволяет себе короткую лязгающую усмешку.{/n} "А вы оригинальная натура, {name}, и я говорю не про беседы с пустотой. Взорвать родовой дворец, пусть и иллюзорный... решение, безусловно, радикальное, и счастье, что мы оба избегли последствий. Впрочем, в смелости вам не откажешь, это бесспорно".
languages.translation_comment: [blueprint] Если мы взорвали таймлуп некронским устройством

traits.locale_text: [draft] Заминка позволила Себериану чуть прийти в себя. Он говорит, что взорвать Даргонус — решение радикальное, могло привести и к гибели всех в экспозиции, но в смелости нам не откажешь.

languages.translation_comment: [blueprint] Если мы взорвали таймлуп некронским устройством

languages.text: {n}Seberian masters his shock and permits himself a short, grinding chuckle.{/n} "You are an original soul, {name} — and I speak not of your conversations with the void. To blow up the dynastic palace, even an illusory one... a decidedly radical decision, and fortunate it is that we both escaped the consequences. Still, no one could deny you have courage."

languages.text: {n}Seberian supera la conmoción y suelta una risita chirriante.{/n} «Es usted muy original, {name}, y no me refiero a sus conversaciones con el vacío. Volar el palacio de la dinastía, aunque se tratara de una ilusión... es una decisión radical, y tenemos suerte de haber salido ilesos, pero demuestra que su coraje es innegable».
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian masters his shock and permits himself a short, grinding chuckle.{/n} "You are an original soul, {name} — and I speak not of your conversations with the void. To blow up the dynastic palace, even an illusory one... a decidedly radical decision, and fortunate it is that we both escaped the consequences. Still, no one could deny you have courage."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian supera la conmoción y suelta una risita chirriante.{/n} «Es usted muy original, {name}, y no me refiero a sus conversaciones con el vacío. Volar el palacio de la dinastía, aunque se tratara de una ilusión... es una decisión radical, y tenemos suerte de haber salido ilesos, pero demuestra que su coraje es innegable».

languages.text: {n}塞贝里安压下震惊，挤出了一声短促而沙哑的轻笑。{/n}“你真是个不走寻常路的家伙，{name}，我说的可不是你对着虚空自言自语那件事。把王朝的宫殿炸掉，哪怕只是虚幻的宫殿……也是个相当激进的决定，好在我们俩都不必面对这件事的后果。不过，没人能否认你的勇气。”
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian masters his shock and permits himself a short, grinding chuckle.{/n} "You are an original soul, {name} — and I speak not of your conversations with the void. To blow up the dynastic palace, even an illusory one... a decidedly radical decision, and fortunate it is that we both escaped the consequences. Still, no one could deny you have courage."

traits.locale_text: {n}塞贝里安压下震惊，挤出了一声短促而沙哑的轻笑。{/n}“你真是个不走寻常路的家伙，{name}，我说的可不是你对着虚空自言自语那件事。把王朝的宫殿炸掉，哪怕只是虚幻的宫殿……也是个相当激进的决定，好在我们俩都不必面对这件事的后果。不过，没人能否认你的勇气。”

languages.text: {n}Sous le choc, Seberian tâche de se maîtriser et s'autorise un bref ricanement grinçant.{/n} « Vous êtes {mf|un original|une originale}, {name}, et je ne parle pas de vos conversations avec le vide. Faire sauter un palais dynastique, même illusoire... Voilà une décision des plus radicales, et il est heureux que nous ayons tous deux échappé à ses conséquences. Pour autant, personne ne peut nier votre courage. »
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian masters his shock and permits himself a short, grinding chuckle.{/n} "You are an original soul, {name} — and I speak not of your conversations with the void. To blow up the dynastic palace, even an illusory one... a decidedly radical decision, and fortunate it is that we both escaped the consequences. Still, no one could deny you have courage."

traits.locale_text: {n}Sous le choc, Seberian tâche de se maîtriser et s'autorise un bref ricanement grinçant.{/n} « Vous êtes {mf|un original|une originale}, {name}, et je ne parle pas de vos conversations avec le vide. Faire sauter un palais dynastique, même illusoire... Voilà une décision des plus radicales, et il est heureux que nous ayons tous deux échappé à ses conséquences. Pour autant, personne ne peut nier votre courage. »

languages.text: {n}Seberian, şoku üzerinden atıyor ve kısa, gıcırtılı bir kıkırtı çıkarıyor.{/n} "Nevi şahsına münhasır bir insansın {name}. Üstelik uçsuzla yaptığın konuşmalardan bahsetmiyorum. Hanedanlık sarayını havaya uçurmak, illüzyon bile olsa... Kesinlikle radikal bir karar ve ikimizin de sonuçlarından kaçabilmiş olması büyük şans. Yine de kimse cesaretini inkâr edemez."
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian masters his shock and permits himself a short, grinding chuckle.{/n} "You are an original soul, {name}, and I speak not of your conversations with the void. To blow up the dynastic palace, even an illusory one... a decidedly radical decision, and fortunate it is that we both escaped the consequences. Still, no one could deny you courage."

Hanedanlık sarayını havaya uçurmak, illüzyon bile olsa... Kesinlikle radikal bir karar ve ikimizin de sonuçlarından kaçabilmiş olması büyük şans. Yine de kimse cesaretini inkâr edemez."

languages.text: {n}セベリアンは驚きを克服し、短い歯ぎしりのような笑いを漏らした。{/n}「あなたは個性的な魂だ、{name}。虚無との会話とは別のことだが、王朝宮殿を爆破するなんて、幻想的なものでも、かなり過激な決断だ。幸い、私たちは両者ともその結果を逃れた。それでも、あなたは勇気があることは否定できない。」
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian masters his shock and permits himself a short, grinding chuckle.{/n} "You are an original soul, {name} — and I speak not of your conversations with the void. To blow up the dynastic palace, even an illusory one... a decidedly radical decision, and fortunate it is that we both escaped the consequences. Still, no one could deny you have courage."

traits.locale_text: {n}セベリアンは驚きを克服し、短い歯ぎしりのような笑いを漏らした。{/n}「あなたは個性的な魂だ、{name}。虚無との会話とは別のことだが、王朝宮殿を爆破するなんて、幻想的なものでも、かなり過激な決断だ。幸い、私たちは両者ともその結果を逃れた。それでも、あなたは勇気があることは否定できない。」

languages.text: {n}Seberian überwindet seinen Schock und gönnt sich ein leises Lachen.{/n} "Ihr seid eine ursprüngliche Seele, {name}, und ich meine damit nicht Eure Gespräche mit der Leere. Den dynastischen Palast zu sprengen, obwohl er nur eine Illusion war ... das war eine ausgesprochen radikale Entscheidung und wir können von Glück sagen, dass wir noch leben. Aber Mut habt, Ihr, das muss ich Euch lassen."
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian masters his shock and permits himself a short, grinding chuckle.{/n} "You are an original soul, {name}, and I speak not of your conversations with the void. To blow up the dynastic palace, even an illusory one... a decidedly radical decision, and fortunate it is that we both escaped the consequences. Still, no one could deny you courage."
